attacks.name: Foresight
attacks.text: Look at the top 5 cards of either player's deck and put them back on top of that player's deck in any order.

attacks.name: Overrun
attacks.text: Choose 1 of your opponent's Benched Pokemon. This attack does 20 damage to that Pokemon.

tests.name: foresight_reorders
tests.description: Test Foresight allows reordering top 5 cards

tests.name: overrun_bench_damage
tests.description: Test Overrun does 20 to a benched Pokemon
